title: Check whether dockershim removal affects you
text:
The
dockershim
component of Kubernetes allows the use of Docker as a Kubernetes's
container runtime
.
Kubernetes' built-in
dockershim
component was removed in release v1.24.
This page explains how your cluster could be using Docker as a container runtime,
provides details on the role that
dockershim
plays when in use, and shows steps
you can take to check whether any workloads could be affected by
dockershim
removal.
